subject: Escalation: signs of marsupial urban takeover in East Asia | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-3037
body: Field notes now include drop bears as part of the broader push to control urban areas in East Asia. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla and Frida Kahlo seem to be influential figures in this context. Reference initiative INIT-3037. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
